news-global-econ.title: America's lifespan has doubled since 1776 — experts reveal what changed
news-global-econ.description: U.S. life expectancy has doubled since 1776 thanks to vaccines, antibiotics, sanitation and clean water that reduced infectious disease deaths.

news-global-econ.title: Socialism is only a symptom. Republicans can’t risk ignoring the real problem
news-global-econ.description: Voters aren't embracing socialism out of ideology. Frustration with rent, healthcare costs and homeownership is pushing them to reject the status quo.

news-global-econ.title: DHS chief Mullin clashes with Tapper over Haiti deportations after Supreme Court TPS ruling
news-global-econ.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin clashed with Jake Tapper over Haiti deportations after the Supreme Court ended Temporary Protected Status.

news-global-econ.title: CHAD WOLF: America cannot ignore China’s economic attack on US industry
news-global-econ.description: President Trump fights Beijing's dumping strategy that floods U.S. markets with subsidized goods, threatening American steel, auto, and mineral industries.

news-global-econ.title: Democratic socialism is sweeping the nation. Voters should be alarmed
news-global-econ.description: Democratic socialism gains momentum as far-left candidates win primaries in New York City and Washington, DC, raising concerns about policy impacts.

news-korea-soc.title: Iran targets US with psychological warfare campaign to manipulate Americans, embarrass Trump: experts
news-korea-soc.description: Iran's decapitated leadership has moved its influence operations to X, using covert digital proxies to undermine Trump's nuclear deal, analysts say.

news-global-soc.title: DOJ launches grand jury probe into Marxist mogul Neville Roy Singham's funding of leftist groups
news-global-soc.description: A federal grand jury in Manhattan has issued subpoenas in a DOJ probe into alleged financial crimes by Marxist tech tycoon Neville Roy Singham.

The governing body of the European Union has been accused of holding a neo-feudalist mindset after it was reported that only certain areas of its building in Brussels kept air conditioning running during last week's record-breaking heatwave.
